title: GridUnits Property
description: When the grid type for the vision sequence is Rectangle, specifies the unit of GridPitchX and GridPitchY property values.
notes:
When the grid type for the vision sequence is Rectangle, specifies the unit of GridPitchX and GridPitchY property values.
